creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Created attachment 149415
patch to emove obsolete hint to disable LAPIC timers

With PR 147180[0] I submitted a change to the acpi(4) manpage, that is obsolete since mav@ introduced the modern event timer infrastructure in FreeBSD 9.

I put mav@ in CC: so he can veto this change.

[0] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=147180

While here, fix too style nits reported by igor(1).
